lean.source: theorem sample (α : Type) (P Q : α → Prop) : (∀ x, P x → Q x) → ∀ x, P x → Q x := by intro h x hx; exact h x hx

expectations.canonical_text: Let alpha be a type. Let P and Q be predicates on alpha. Assume that, for every x, if P holds of x, then Q holds of x. Then, for every x, if P holds of x, then Q holds of x.
